chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-8487 of 2018 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of Misc. No.37178/2018 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 30.03.2022. Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the respondents along with Mr. Tariq Aziz, principle appraiser of Customs Department. >><< Learned counsel appearing for the petitioner states that the issue involved in the instant petition stands squarely covered by the decision given in the case of Messrs Sky Overseas through authorized attorney Vs. Federation of Pakistan through Secretary, Revenue Division and 4 others (2019 PTD 1964), which is also endorsed by the learned counsel for the respondents. We, therefore, dispose of this petition along with the listed application in the same terms and method as decided in the above referred case. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
